questions.question: Write a step-by-step explanation of how the Selection Sort algorithm works, and provide a simple example to illustrate its implementation
questions.hint: Focus on the algorithm's time complexity and its implementation in code

questions.question: Compare the time complexities of Bubble Sort and Insertion Sort. Which one is more efficient for large datasets, and explain why?
questions.hint: Consider the average and worst-case scenarios

questions.question: Describe the differences between the Bubble Sort and Selection Sort algorithms, including their space complexities and average-case performance.
questions.hint: Discuss the role of in-place sorting and external sorting algorithms
